title: Retail Investors Are Selling Stocks to Raise Money for SpaceX
sentences: Retail Investors Are Selling Stocks to Raise Money for SpaceX Retail investors are clearing the decks ahead of the SpaceX IPO.
For two straight days this week, ordinary investors dumped their single-stock holdings on a net basis, according to Vanda Research.
The moves suggests that mom-and-pop investors are amassing dry powder ahead of SpaceX's anticipated public debut tomorrow.
